title: Epic: Integrate record-audio script into kakitori
description: Integrate the record-audio script (~/.local/bin/record-audio) into kakitori. This may require adding a main menu to provide options for recording new audio or processing existing files.

title: Research transcript analysis approaches and options
description: Research different approaches for analyzing transcripts using LLMs. Explore various analysis types: conversation summaries, participant posture analysis, action items/next steps extraction, conclusions, and other useful analysis patterns. Consider prompt engineering strategies and structured output formats.

title: Epic: Normalize audio volume in record-audio script
description: Adjust the record-audio script to normalize audio volume, handling different recording sources that produce varying volume levels. This ensures consistent audio levels for better transcription quality.

title: Epic: Add transcript analysis process
description: Add a process to analyze transcripts with multiple analysis options: conversation summary, participant postures summary, next steps, conclusions, and other analysis types. This should be a flexible system that allows selecting different analysis approaches.

title: Research record-audio script functionality and integration approach
description: Study the record-audio script at ~/.local/bin/record-audio to understand its functionality, dependencies, and how to integrate it into kakitori. Consider whether a main menu is needed for selecting between recording and processing modes.

title: Epic: Allow extra context files for analysis
description: Enable including additional context through text files when analyzing transcripts. This should allow users to provide background information, documents, or other relevant context that can enhance the analysis quality.

title: Research audio normalization techniques and tools
description: Research audio normalization methods suitable for command-line processing. Explore tools like ffmpeg-normalize, sox, or Python libraries (pydub, librosa). Consider trade-offs between processing time, quality, and ease of integration into the record-audio script.

title: Research context file integration patterns
description: Research approaches for integrating external context files into LLM analysis workflows. Explore file formats (text, markdown, JSON), token management strategies, and methods for providing context to analysis prompts. Consider user experience for specifying context files.
